hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); [ -z "$f" ] && exit 0; pnpm exec oxfmt "$f" 2>/dev/null || true; case "$f" in *.ts|*.tsx|*.js|*.jsx|*.mjs|*.cjs) LINT=$(pnpm exec oxlint "$f" 2>&1); echo "$LINT" | grep -qE 'warning|error' && jq -n --arg ctx "Lint issues found in $f — fix before finishing:\n$LINT" '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":$ctx}}' || true ;; esac; exit 0
